name: Neophyte (1=10)
description: The grade associated with Malkuth. The task is to obtain control of the astral plane.

name: Zelator (2=9)
description: Associated with Yesod. The task is to master the foundations of yoga and the physical body.

name: Practicus (3=8)
description: Associated with Hod. The task is to master the intellect and the Qabalah.

name: Philosophus (4=7)
description: Associated with Netzach. The task is to master the emotions and moral nature.

name: Adeptus Minor (5=6)
description: Associated with Tiphareth. The task is to attain the Knowledge and Conversation of the Holy Guardian Angel.

name: Adeptus Major (6=5)
description: Associated with Geburah. The task is to learn the practical application of Magick.

name: Adeptus Exemptus (7=4)
description: Associated with Chesed. The task is to write a thesis setting forth a complete system of the universe.

name: Magister Templi (8=3)
description: Associated with Binah. The task is the crossing of the Abyss and the destruction of the ego.

name: Magus (9=2)
description: Associated with Chokmah. The task is to declare a new Word (Logos) to humanity.

name: Ipsissimus (10=1)
description: Associated with Kether. The highest grade, utterly beyond comprehension.
